# 🧬 CGT 每日情报 (Daily Brief)
> **日期**: 2026-05-05 | **更新时间**: 07:14 (北京时间)
> **监控范围**: Global (In vivo/FDA) & China (NMPA/Biotech)

---

## 🌍 全球前沿 (FDA / In vivo / MNCs)
- `[04:05]` **维安生物任命 Melinda Lackey 为总法律顾问**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Valion Bio Appoints Melinda Lackey as General Counsel* [🔗Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirgFBVV95cUxPS3QtUktrM0stR08teFZibVp3ODA2VTFrN1A4MEZFNDZRcnBabUhpYldYMm92U1IyR3djWGN5MGVpU2lBM1g2eFB6c3FCRDhHczlCNWc4MWJSOS1JbUlvd0ZJWWUzZmV5eGd4YmxVdWd0Z1BUa0xja3hPdk10RlppakdUY3QzbEh4Sk1TXzdWMVFLSTMwUmJnSEZQQlQ2cVVNVTNBU3hxMmtmYl9VZ2c?oc=5)</small>
- `[20:00]` **GA 患者的 3 年结果在 2026 年抗盲基金会视网膜创新峰会上公布**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *3 Year Results in Patients With GA Presented at Foundation Fighting Blindness Retinal Innovation Summit 2026* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[19:00]` **Ascidian 完成 ACDN-01 治疗 Stargardt 病的 1/2 期 STELLAR 试验的剂量递增部分，并宣布扩大临床研究计划**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Ascidian Completes Dose Escalation Portion of Phase 1/2 STELLAR Trial of ACDN-01 for Stargardt Disease and Announces Expanded Clinical Study Plans* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[14:45]` **Valerio Therapeutics 宣布成立 InVimmune，一家致力于开发差异化体内细胞治疗方法的新公司**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Valerio Therapeutics Announces the Launch of InVimmune, a New Company Dedicated to Developing Differentiated in Vivo Cell Therapy Approaches* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
